features: Add Your Own Names – Each ornament can be customised with your family’s names by using the permanent pen for making it a meaningful holiday keepsake
Custom Family of 3 Ornament – Personalised Christmas tree decoration designed for families of 3 wearing matching pajamas and opening presents under the Christmas tree
Perfect Family Gift – A wonderful Christmas gift idea for parents, children, grandparents, or family friends to celebrate the holiday season together
Versatile design — perfect as an ornament for your tree, standfree for the table or a charming magnet for your fridge

Lightweight & Easy to Hang – Made from high-quality polyresin, handpainted, lightweight, and includes a ribbon loop for easy tree decoration placement. Dimensions 3 x 3 x 0.5 inches, weights 105g; arrives in protective packaging
description: Celebrate the magic of Christmas with our Personalised Family of 3 Ornament, designed for families of three who want to make the holidays extra special. This festive red matching pyjamas ornament features three people figures wearing matching pajamas and opening presents under the Christmas tree, ready to be customised with your family’s names. A perfect keepsake to capture your family’s holiday memories, this ornament makes a thoughtful Christmas tree decoration or a heartfelt gift for parents, grandparents, and loved ones. Click "Customise now" to add your personal touch!
